trending_themes.theme: Backend producer with limited public profile
trending_themes.evidence: Operating in background of K-pop production landscape; credits on tracks including Red Velvet 'Bad Boy'; limited mainstream 2026 documentation.
Associated with Iconic Sounds LLC for music production and publishing; Asia market focus; professional infrastructure present but low public visibility.

annotation_hooks: Maxx Song represents K-pop's invisible labor ecosystem — producers rarely credited in fan culture despite shaping sonic identity
Producer anonymity in K-pop mirrors the idol-system's front-of-house/back-of-house split; Maxx Song contrasts with Teddy Park's newly visible Grammy trajectory
